CoverageStatus.description: Operator-facing status of one detector/scope in the coverage matrix.
CoverageStatus.title: CoverageStatus

DetectionCoverage.description: One detector and optional ecosystem scope, with explicit zero-find evidence.
DetectionCoverage.title: DetectionCoverage

DetectionStatus.description: Coverage state for Analyzer's vulnerability-detection pass.
DetectionStatus.title: DetectionStatus

DetectorKind.description: Detection engines whose execution/coverage is surfaced to operators.
DetectorKind.title: DetectorKind

Severity.description: Severity level of a finding, ordered from informational to critical.
Severity.title: Severity

Vulnerability.description: A vulnerability finding affecting a specific asset on a host.

affected_asset_id.description: References Asset.asset_id from the same report
affected_asset_id.title: Affected Asset Id

evidence.description: Short, human-readable proof (e.g. matched package version)
evidence.title: Evidence

parent_asset_id.description: Owning image/container asset_id when the affected package came from a nested image/container scan; lets CVEs be grouped per image/container. None for host-level findings.
parent_asset_id.title: Parent Asset Id

source.description: Scanner / engine that produced the finding
source.title: Source

vuln_id.description: CVE id, vendor advisory id, or scanner-local id (e.g. GHSA-..., CVE-2024-1234)
vuln_id.title: Vuln Id

Vulnerability.title: Vulnerability

description:
analyzer-derived: vulnerability findings computed for one AssetReport.

Produced by `analyzer.detect` after ingest (or on demand via `/detect`).
Carries enough provenance to attribute findings back to a host/report.

collected_at.description: When the source AssetReport was collected
collected_at.title: Collected At

coverage.description: Per-detector and per-ecosystem coverage; empty on legacy rows.
coverage.title: Coverage

detection_status.description: Whether Analyzer completed vulnerability matching. A complete empty result is a verified zero-finding pass; disabled/partial/failed must not be presented as clean. The conservative partial default keeps pre-coverage historical records from being upgraded to complete.

ecosystem.description: OSV ecosystem used for matching, e.g. 'Debian:12'
ecosystem.title: Ecosystem

status_reason.description: Stable operator-facing reason when coverage is not complete.
status_reason.title: Status Reason

truncated.description: True when generation limits omitted one or more findings.
truncated.title: Truncated

truncation_reason.description: Which item/byte ceiling caused findings to be omitted.
truncation_reason.title: Truncation Reason

uncovered_package_count.description: Packages with a resolved ecosystem that was absent from the atomic OSV sync manifest and therefore was not matched.
uncovered_package_count.title: Uncovered Package Count

unresolved_package_count.description: Packages skipped because no OSV ecosystem could be resolved.
unresolved_package_count.title: Unresolved Package Count

title: DetectionResult
